module.name: no-identical-branches
module.description: Disallow identical if/else and conditional-expression branches; consolidate duplicate conditional fragments.

scenarios.name: should allow an if/else with different branch bodies
scenarios.given: an if statement whose consequent and alternate have different statements

scenarios.name: should allow a ternary whose true and false branches differ
scenarios.given: a conditional expression condition ? a : b where a !== b textually

scenarios.name: should report an if/else where both branches contain the same code
scenarios.given: an if statement where consequent and alternate are textually identical blocks

scenarios.name: should report a ternary where both branches are the same expression
scenarios.given: a conditional expression condition ? x : x
